summary: AR Release Gate feature testing complete. All 27 backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified: ReadinessSummaryCard shows on dashboard with status counts, ARReleaseGatePanel shows on sales document detail page with 5 checks and override status.
seed_data_creation: Used existing sales document 8fec1917-0961-41c4-a327-4e5924aad5f8 with ar_release_gate data
context_for_next_testing_agent: AR Release Gate feature fully functional. Verified: (1) GET /api/ar-release/metrics returns total_evaluated, by_status, top_blocking_reasons. (2) POST /api/ar-release/evaluate/{doc_id} evaluates sales docs, skips non-sales docs, returns 404 for non-existent docs. (3) POST /api/ar-release/override/{doc_id} changes status to 'override' with approved_by and notes. (4) GET /api/ar-release/queue returns documents with ar_release_gate, filters by status. (5) Dashboard readiness_summary in workflow-intelligence includes by_status, by_action, confidence_by_status, top_blocking_reasons, top_warning_reasons. (6) GET /api/settings/config returns 11 config keys (config_service rewiring verified). (7) ARReleaseGatePanel UI shows on sales document detail with 5 checks (customer_resolution, prepay_hold, credit_limit, payment_terms, ship_to), status badge, evaluate button, and override info when applicable.

elements_verified: Status counts: ready_auto_draft (0), ready_auto_link (4), needs_review (29), blocked (44), ambiguous (2)
5 checks: Customer Resolution, Prepay Hold, Credit Limit, Payment Terms, Ship-to Address
Override button not visible (status is 'override', not 'held')

coverage: TestARReleaseMetrics (4 tests): endpoint 200, total_evaluated, by_status, top_blocking_reasons
TestARReleaseEvaluate (3 tests): sales doc evaluation, non-sales skip, nonexistent 404
TestARReleaseOverride (2 tests): override accepts request, nonexistent returns error
TestARReleaseQueue (4 tests): endpoint 200, returns documents, filter by released, filter by held
TestWorkflowIntelligenceReadinessSummary (7 tests): endpoint 200, readiness_summary present, by_status, by_action, confidence_by_status, top_blocking_reasons, top_warning_reasons
TestReadinessMetrics (2 tests): endpoint 200, required fields present
TestConfigServiceRewiring (4 tests): config 200, 11+ keys, status 200, connection info
TestSalesDocumentARGate (1 test): fetch and verify ar_release_gate structure
Document detail page loads with ARReleaseGatePanel
AR gate status, checks, and override info displayed

mocked_api_note: Microsoft Graph API, BC write operations, and JWT Auth are MOCKED
